---
title: 'StreamGrid: Streaming Point Cloud Analytics via Compulsory Splitting and Deterministic
  Termination'
author:
- Yu Feng
- Zheng Liu
- Weikai Lin
- Zihan Liu
- Jingwen Leng
- Minyi Guo
- Zhezhi He
- Jieru Zhao
- Yuhao Zhu
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3676641.3716021
journ: ASPLOS
year: 2025
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 92
---
